# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kafka topic authorization.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

broker.id=1
listeners=PLAINTEXT://:9092,PLAINTEXT://your-broker-hostname:9093
advertised.listeners=PLAINTEXT://your-broker-hostname:9092
log.dirs=/var/lib/kafka/logs
num.partitions=3
default.replication.factor=3
min.insync.replicas=2
zookeeper.connect=your-zookeeper-host:2181
auto.create.topics.enable=false
delete.topic.enable=true
security.inter.broker.protocol=PLAINTEXT
listener.security.protocol.map=PLAINTEXT:PLAINTEXT
sasl.enabled.mechanisms=PLAIN
sasl.mechanism.inter.broker.protocol=PLAIN
sasl.jaas.config=org.apache.kafka.common.security.plain.PlainLoginModule required username="your_username" password="your_password";
inter.broker.listener.name=PLAINTEXT
log.retention.hours=168
log.retention.check.interval.ms=300000
log.segment.bytes=1073741824
log.cleaner.enable=true
log.cleaner.dedupe.buffer.size=134217728
log.cleaner.dedupe.buffer.max.bytes=1073741824
zookeeper.session.timeout.ms=6000
zookeeper.sync.time.ms=200
zookeeper.max.initiator.connections=10
zookeeper.connection.timeout.ms=30000
zookeeper.connection.max.retries=5
zookeeper.connection.retry.interval.ms=1000
zookeeper.connection.retry.backoff.ms=1000
zookeeper.connection.retry.timeout.ms=60000
zookeeper.connection.retry.max.retries=10
zookeeper.connection.retry.max.interval.ms=10000
zookeeper.connection.retry.min.interval.ms=1000
